title: populus simonii var. liaotungensis
intro: Populus simonii var. liaotungensis, also known as Liaoning Poplar or Liaotung Poplar, is a variety of the Simon's Poplar tree, native to the northeastern region of China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Populus simonii var. liaotungensis include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating wounds. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
